title: Props Mod
description: Adding useful props for decorating your sets in Minecraft!
body:
![Props Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10c3995ad5fa4ef76be6fa6d53162f5168637b0f.png)
Adds various props to decorate with. Limitless possibilities! The sky is the limit with this mod! Customize various set designs, YouTube sets, movie sets, and more with this one mod!

Latest Youtube Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/o7Hn-GFu_3g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
